Day advanced to 2026-03-20.
10,432 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
27 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 1 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-03-21): ['774274']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-19 -> 2026-03-20)

- "Which Sudanese state will the attacked teaching hospital be reported to be in, by March 21, 2026?" → East Darfur
- "Which country will authorities identify by March 25, 2026, as the location of a mass grave from which dozens of bodies, including children, are exhumed?" → Kenya
- "In which city will Eritrea host Eswatini in the first leg of 2027 Africa Cup of Nations qualifying on March 25, 2026?" → Meknes

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 107 (303 resolved, 27 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.93
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
